issues.title: POST /api/initialize-prompts — missing auth middleware
reproSteps: Send POST /api/initialize-prompts without a session cookie
Observe response
issues.expected: 401 Unauthorized
issues.actual: Route executes without authentication check

issues.title: POST /api/ai-providers/refresh — missing auth middleware
reproSteps: Send POST /api/ai-providers/refresh without a session cookie
Observe response
issues.expected: 401 Unauthorized
issues.actual: Route executes without authentication check

issues.title: Server error response leaks internal error.message to client
reproSteps: Trigger a server error on POST /api/chats/:id/messages (e.g. DB unavailable)
Inspect response body
issues.expected: Generic error message: { message: "Failed to send message" }
issues.actual: Response includes raw error.message which may expose stack/internal detail

issues.title: POST /api/api-keys — provider field not validated against allowlist
reproSteps: POST /api/api-keys with body { provider: 'malicious', apiKey: 'test' }
Observe that no allowlist check rejects the provider value
issues.expected: 400 — provider must be one of: openai, gemini, claude, grok
issues.actual: Arbitrary provider string accepted (only validation is via AIOrchestrator.validateApiKey which may throw)

issues.title: No rate limiting on any API endpoints
reproSteps: Send 1000 POST /api/chats/:id/messages requests in rapid succession
Observe API keys being consumed, no throttling applied
issues.expected: Rate limiting middleware (e.g. express-rate-limit) present
issues.actual: No rate limiting — unlimited requests accepted per user/IP

issues.title: User message content logged to server console (potential PII leak)
reproSteps: Send a message containing sensitive information
Inspect server console output
issues.expected: Message content NOT logged; only chat/message IDs logged
issues.actual: First 100 chars of user message content written to console.log

issues.title: GET /api/chats/:id — no NaN guard on parseInt(req.params.id)
reproSteps: GET /api/chats/notanumber
Observe DB query with NaN id
issues.expected: 400 Bad Request — invalid chat ID format
issues.actual: parseInt returns NaN, which is passed to DB query; behaviour undefined

issues.title: Context window hardcoded to last 10 messages — no model-aware limit
reproSteps: Create a chat and send 15+ messages
Observe that only the last 10 are sent as context to the AI
issues.expected: Context limit varies by model context window (or is configurable)
issues.actual: Hardcoded slice(-10) ignores model-specific limits

issues.title: .env.example file missing from repo root
reproSteps: Look for .env.example in repo root
File does not exist
issues.expected: .env.example documenting all required environment variables
issues.actual: No .env.example — new contributors have no reference for required env vars

issues.title: console.log may output sensitive data
reproSteps: Inspect server/routes.ts:208
Trigger the code path that executes this log
Check server stdout for sensitive output
issues.expected: Sensitive fields omitted or redacted from log output
issues.actual: console statement on line 208 references sensitive keyword(s): content, message, userId
